message:
refactor: split queries.go by domain into parsing, search, and delete files (bd-rgyd)

Split the 2263-line queries.go into domain-focused files:
- parsing.go: shared timestamp/JSON parsing utilities (66 lines)
- search.go: SearchIssues and filterByLabelRegex (351 lines)
- delete.go: DeleteIssue, DeleteIssues, and all delete helpers (396 lines)
- queries.go: remaining CRUD and lifecycle operations (1481 lines)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/jasper
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
